channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: The Odyssey â the Twisted Epic We Deserve
item.description: Christopher Nolan's unheroic epic transforms the way movies are experienced.

item.title: Rubio Confronts an Epidemic of Left-Wing Violence and Extortion
item.description: The accounts of Marco Rubio and Democrat Adam Smith should be convincing about the threat's severity. Will progressives listen?

item.title: 7 Ways DSA Plans To Turn America Into A Third-World Communist Country
item.description: DSA candidates are currently gaining momentum in America, winning major elections across the country.

item.title: DC's Newest Museum Tells Tale Of National Geographic's Tragic Fall From Patriot Explorers To Globalism Activists
item.description: The exhibit room openly stated that National Geographic's purpose had shifted as Americans became more climate-focused.
